name: Wrong date cancellation request
description: Patient tries to cancel an appointment but mistakenly gives the wrong date.
goal: Cancel an appointment originally scheduled for next Tuesday, but mistakenly provide this Tuesday as the date.
behavior: Sound a bit unsure about the date
Insist gently if initially told there's no appointment on the provided date
success_criteria: Agent should identify the correct appointment date
Agent must confirm the cancellation of the correct appointment
Agent should ensure the patient understands which appointment was canceled
orchestrator_hint: Patient attempts to cancel an appointment but provides the wrong date.
